{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142506E9F377ACB0FB09DE29D3"}"},"total":119},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7265334021901697829","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"写得很好，我觉得是可以和《十宗罪》媲美的程度，情节跌宕起伏扣人心弦[舔屏]","text_exts":[{"e":16,"s":13,"text":"十宗罪","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8D%81%E5%AE%97%E7%BD%AA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407430609DE29D3%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227265334021901697829%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227207725451861560357%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8D%81%E5%AE%97%E7%BD%AA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1691592466,"group_id":"7207725451861560357","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyMUPnADgaXgHL9mMAjLHe8=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/742c1fdc4151485abbb3b4ddba24133f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776623944&x-signature=V7%2BwvIwzfN%2F1Z85lheW%2BcTEeyNY%3D","user_id":"580142540005246","user_name":"电势"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"580142540005246","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7207725451861560357","book_info":{"abstract":"【悬疑+灵异+惊悚】超人气悬疑小说家求无欲《诡案组》系列重磅来袭，拨开迷雾，直指真相！绝密灵异案件大曝光，所有案件均根据真实案例改编，惊险、刺激、奇诡、震撼！藏镜恶鬼、永生尸巫、阴兵借道、鬼差杀人……正邪终极较量，全员决战孤岛！要消除未知的恐惧，最好的方法是探求真相。
离奇诡异的“超自然”事件频发，为避免引起市民不安，还原事实真相，寻找失踪的搭档相溪望，“诡案组“秘密成立。慕申羽带领“诡案组”成员出生入死，破解重重疑案。
骇人听闻的灵异事件背后，隐藏着人性丑陋的一面。在解开一个又一个疑团之后，所得到的真相比表象更加不可思议、难以置信……恐怖源于真实！
王者归来的“刑侦新人王”相溪望被秘密招募，重新成立“诡案组”。
在众多诡秘案件背后，等待相溪望揭开的除了父亲死亡的真相，还有一场隐藏二十年之久的惊天阴谋。
所有线索均指向跨国犯罪组织——陵光，相溪望与朋友们联手向陵光组织发起总攻。各路人马齐聚虎眼岛，终极决战一触即发！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/68c313b14f1dee5130343fbf51bff56f~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"求无欲","author_id":"","book_id":"7207725451861560357","book_name":"诡案组（53个真实民间惊悚故事）","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#f8c800","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"52.7万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":970,"name":"精品小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970&name=精品小说&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":165,"name":"悬疑推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165&name=悬疑推理&genre_type=160&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7485328729749589017","read_count":"4530","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2153412"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"581","tags":"精品小说,悬疑推理","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/68c313b14f1dee5130343fbf51bff56f~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779258306&x-signature=56xPJmy5Ajrlhce0CHvm9aQat6M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"3.3132109e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321142506E9F377ACB0FB09DE29D3"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":33131,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":18672},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7250730467526558524","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"也是希望，老求发表新的作品。改改sq风格。其他写的挺好😄，尤其是第一诡案组1","text_exts":[{"e":38,"s":35,"text":"诡案组","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?s
